# transform

**Instance Property**

A transform applied to the light’s position and direction before calculating the contribution of the light.

## Declaration

```swift
var transform: GLKEffectPropertyTransform { get set }
```

## Discussion

The default value is the identity matrix.

## Configuring Common Lighting Properties

- **enabled**: A Boolean value that indicates whether calculations should be performed on this light.
- **position**: The position of the light in world coordinates.
